plugins.name: New+
plugins.description: 根据模板创建文件/文件夹
plugins.author: leafmoes

plugins.description: Добавляет иконки для контекстного меню как в Windows 11 / Change the right-click menu to Windows 11 style icons
plugins.author: Glaz_almaz

plugins.name: better-terminal
plugins.description: 增加管理员方式打开终端
plugins.author: Enlysure

plugins.name: 常用功能小图标 - Copy paste etc. in one line
plugins.description: 将复制，剪切等常用功能按钮添加到右键菜单的第一行小图标
plugins.author: MicroBlock
plugins.local_path: 常用功能小图标 - Copy paste etc. in one line.js

plugins.author: MicroBlock
plugins.local_path: 右键菜单清理 - Context Menu Cleaner.js

plugins.name: 复制文件路径 Pro
plugins.description: 复制文件路径，文件名，拓展名，多个文件路径...
plugins.author: MicroBlock

plugins.name: Windows 11 Icon Pack
plugins.description: 给右键菜单换上 Windows 11 风格的图标 / Change the right-click menu to Windows 11 style icons
plugins.author: Unknown

plugins.name: 插件图标主题色
plugins.description: 让部分插件添加的图标染上系统主题色 / Colorize icons added by other plugins with accent color

plugins.name: 桌面右键配置 Breeze
plugins.description: 在桌面右键菜单添加“配置 Breeze”选项，点击后打开 Breeze 数据目录
plugins.author: leafmoes

plugins.name: 链接详情显示
plugins.description: 显示当前选中文件(夹)的链接详情（支持软链接、硬链接、符号链接）。点击路径可以直接复制。
plugins.author: NahidaBuer

shell.changelog: ### 功能特性 - **(general)** 高优先级启动 （#277) - **(general)** 在错误处理程序中输出对象转储 - **(general)** 支持"腾讯桌面整理" (DesktopMgr64.exe) (#297) - **(general)** 确保菜单回调顺序 - **(config)** 自定义主题/动画界面 - **(config)** 配置页英语支持 (#299) - **(hook)** 实现install_GetUIObjectOf_hook - **(js)** 实现 OneCommander 兼容函数 - **(js)** 实现`current_process_name`、`current_process_path`以及键盘/鼠标模拟 - **(scheme)** 添加 `language` 项 - **(ui)** 异常测试页面和动画编辑器增强 - **(general)** 为测试页面添加测试文本 - **(general)** 为C++异常添加SIGABRT处理器 ### 错误修复 - **(hook)** 检查`def->hwnd`是否可用以绕过后台调用 - **(inject)** 正确查找字体 - **(shell)** 改进获取 icon_bitmap 的方式并支持 OneCommander ### 文档 - **(general)** 在README中添加OneCommander兼容性信息 ### 代码重构 - **(general)** 改进主题编辑器 - **(general)** 使用sentry进行错误处理 - **(general)** 优化COM绑定 - **(general)** 重命名common hook为install_NtUserTrackPopupMenuEx_hook以提高清晰度 - **(general)** 正确处理HandleMenuMsg以实现onecommander兼容 - **(config)** 提升性能和自定义动画界面 - **(script)** 优化代码结构 ### 杂务 - **(general)** 移除BREEZE_BUILD_DATE_TIME及相关API以减少重建时间 - **(general)** 更新breeze-ui - **(general)** 更新blook并使用MD运行时 - **(general)** 更新breeze-ui --- ### Features - **(general)** High priority startup (#277) - **(general)** Output object dump in error handler - **(general)** Support "Tencent Desktop Manager" (DesktopMgr64.exe) (#297) - **(general)** Ensure menu callback order - **(config)** Custom theme/animation interface - **(config)** English support for configuration page (#299) - **(hook)** Implement install_GetUIObjectOf_hook - **(js)** Implement OneCommander compatibility functions - **(js)** Implement `current_process_name`, `current_process_path`, and keyboard/mouse simulation - **(scheme)** Add `language` item - **(ui)** Exception test page and animation editor enhancements - **(general)** Add test text for test page - **(general)** Add SIGABRT handler for C++ exceptions ### Bug Fixes - **(hook)** Check if `def->hwnd` is available to bypass background calls - **(inject)** Correctly locate fonts - **(shell)** Improve method for obtaining icon_bitmap and support OneCommander ### Documentation - **(general)** Add OneCommander compatibility information in README ### Code Refactoring - **(general)** Improve theme editor - **(general)** Use Sentry for error handling - **(general)** Optimize COM bindings - **(general)** Rename common hook to install_NtUserTrackPopupMenuEx_hook for clarity - **(general)** Properly handle HandleMenuMsg for OneCommander compatibility - **(config)** Enhance performance and custom animation interface - **(script)** Optimize code structure ### Chores - **(general)** Remove BREEZE_BUILD_DATE_TIME and related APIs to reduce rebuild time - **(general)** Update breeze-ui - **(general)** Update blook and use MD runtime - **(general)** Update breeze-ui
